name: Possible Turla LightNeuron Backdoor Installation
notes: This rule triggers when a Turla "LightNeuron" Backdoor is installed. LightNeuron targets Microsoft Exchange email servers making use of the Transport Agent.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefintion: Turla LightNeuron Objects match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 5 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Turla LightNeuron Installation match
conditions_text: when BB:BehaviorDefintion: Turla LightNeuron Objects match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 5 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Turla LightNeuron Installation match
thresholds: when BB:BehaviorDefintion: Turla LightNeuron Objects match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 5 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Turla LightNeuron Installation match
TD_list: APPLY Possible Turla LightNeuron Backdoor Installation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when BB:BehaviorDefintion: Turla LightNeuron Objects match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 5 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Turla LightNeuron Installation match
RED_list: Event name: Possible Turla LightNeuron Backdoor Installation
Event description: Detects when a Turla "LightNeuron" Backdoor is installed. LightNeuron targets Microsoft Exchange email servers making use of the Transport Agent.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
